violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service, and ice will be used from the Lodge. Service was called during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The kitchen door has an accumulation of soil residue and grime. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the wall-mounted fan in dishwasher area, and table with slicer, mixer, and robot coupe on it have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The kitchen door to the bistro facing Macoun area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025

Raw animal foods (such as liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as butter packets) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer in process of cleaning during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2023
Dumpster lid by Courtyard observed in poor repair. Litter observed on ground. Area to be maintained clean and free of litter. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

The window by the AC unit was observed with soil residue and small flies carcasses. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
